# Extracao: transcription_mp4_01__Getting_Started

- **Tipo:** TXT

---

Ideally, you and your partner are now sitting in the same room. In this section, you'll be sharing your stories, so make sure you're in a quiet place where you feel comfortable having an in-depth and meaningful conversation. You'll also need a strong internet connection so we can continue to guide you through this part. Your partner should be ready to take notes in their partner guide. If you have everything you need, move on to the next video. If your setup needs a little adjustment, take the time to get it right to help ensure you get the best results.
